pageContext.name: The Batman™ Who Laughs
pageContext.description: You know I am something twisted and wrong, and that terrifies you.   Sideshow Art Prints presents The Batman™ Who Laughs Fine Art Print, a frightening new DC Comics art print by artist Richard Luong.  He's battier than your average baddy, but a joker all the same! The Batman Who Laughs proves to be a chilling threat to the Justice League as he emerges from the Dark Multiverse. This portrait shows Bruce Wayne warped by Joker venom into a giddy and gruesome killer without remorse. Surrounded by his feral Robins and an eerie red glow, he reaches across Earths to deliver visions of demented justice as seen through his Dark Metal Visor.  Each The Batman Who Laughs Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this sinister scene is a must-have for any Batman artwork collection! Pair this print with the Batman Who Laughs Premium Format™ Figure by Sideshow, sold separately, for the ultimate arrangement of multiversal evil in your home.  Gaze into the darkness when you bring home The Batman Who Laughs Fine Art Print by Richard Luong today.
